sections.paragraph:
(= מְהֵימַן Ch. and Syr. faithful), [Heman]-

(1) pr.n. of a certain wise man, who flourished before the days of Solomon ( 1Ki 5:11), of the tribe of Judah, 1Ch 2:6. There is a different-(2) Heman, a Levite of the family of the Kohathites, a leader of David’s choir, 1Ch 6:18 15:17 16:41 , 42 1Ch 16:42 Psa 88:1 compare Thes. p. 117.
